name: claude-team-hierarchy
description: Claude Code plugin: nested 5-level team-lead orchestration (CEO delegates only, opus-only dispatch, author != reviewer, mandatory memory) — skill + subagents + /team-start command + opus-enforcement hook.

name: code-audit-suite
description: Local Docker-based code-quality & security tool chain as Claude Code skills — one orchestrator drives a codebase to zero (quality, security, licensing, and that it compiles/builds).

name: the-real-hetzner-mcp
description: Local MCP server (stdio) exposing the entire Hetzner Cloud API as 201 typed tools — read and write

name: the-real-snipeit-mcp
description: MCP server for Snipe-IT REST API (100% coverage, hand-wrappers + codegen)

name: the-real-bitwarden-mcp
description: Local stdio MCP server for Bitwarden (Public API + Secrets Manager). 50+ admin tools for members, groups, collections, policies, licensing, projects, and secrets. For Claude Desktop / Claude Code.

name: the-real-unifi-mcp
description: MCP server (stdio) for the UniFi Site Manager + Network APIs — 167 tools covering the documented API surface: 86 ergonomic hand-wrappers + 80 auto-generated + a raw-request escape hatch. Read + write, cloud-only, lazy ID discovery, optional write-confirm.
